reviews.review_description: It’s a nice game. Even tho it is one of those games with the gorilla tag movement it brings new things like game modes that are fun and challenges to earn in game currency. 10/10

reviews.review_title: This is the next gorilla tag

reviews.review_description: I just got the game and I have to admit that I’m impressed. The movement and overall quality of the game is amazing. However I got sad because no one was online so I hope this review makes the game more popular, I’ll tell my friends about this so we can grow the community.

developer_response.body:
Hello! I am really happy you enjoyed the game for the little content out right now. I am actively working on a horror gamemode.  You can see a "Teaser" in game right now on the gamemode select screen. And thank you for sharing the game with your friends I really appreciate it. If you want to keep up to date with everything going on in game you should consider joining our discord community at https://discord.com/invite/cBHdubw4ZA 

- Envist
